title: Vriesea splitgerberi
taxonomy: Vriesea splitgerberi is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This epiphytic plant is native to South America and is commonly known as the Splitgerber's Vriesea. The genus Vriesea is a part of the subfamily Tillandsioideae, which is a group of bromeliads that are characterized by their small flowers and usually hairy or leathery leaves. Vriesea splitgerberi is also a member of the subgenus Tillandsia, which is further divided into several sections based on morphological characteristics. The species is typically found in tropical forests, where it grows on tree trunks and branches.
